scripts.build: npm run build -w @groceryview/core && npm run build -w @groceryview/api && npm run build -w @groceryview/auth && npm run build -w @groceryview/notifications && npm run build -w @groceryview/server && npm run build -w @groceryview/db && npm run build -w @groceryview/scanning && npm run build -w @groceryview/monetization && npm run build -w @groceryview/ops && npm run build -w @groceryview/catalog && npm run build -w @groceryview/ingestion && npm run build -w @groceryview/mobile && npm run build -w @groceryview/web
scripts.test: npm run test -w @groceryview/core && npm run test -w @groceryview/api && npm run test -w @groceryview/auth && npm run test -w @groceryview/notifications && npm run test -w @groceryview/server && npm run test -w @groceryview/db && npm run test -w @groceryview/scanning && npm run test -w @groceryview/monetization && npm run test -w @groceryview/ops && npm run test -w @groceryview/catalog && npm run test -w @groceryview/ingestion && npm run test -w @groceryview/mobile && npm run test -w @groceryview/web && node --test tests/schema/*.test.mjs
